name: inspektor-gadget
description: Inspektor Gadget integration for Azure SRE Agent: read-only, kernel-level Kubernetes observability (DNS, TCP, exec, files, signals, OOM, syscalls) from already-running eBPF gadgets via plain 'kubectl get configmap' and 'kubectl logs' (logs operator) — no kubectl debug/exec/port-forward, kubectl gadget plugin, or jq required.
